title: SVBPH Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Junior Resident Posts
description: Sardar Vallabh Bhai Patel Hospital has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 2 Junior Resident Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates who have qualified in the MBBS to apply for the SVBPH Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all apply f...
